news.title: AI wildlife warning system trial aims to reduce animal
news.description: [ABC (AUSTRALIAN BROADCASTING CORPORATION)] An estimated 10 million animals are killed on Australian roads each year. It's hoped a new artificial intelligence-powered alert system being trialled on the Monaro Highway near Canberra will reduce the toll.
